requirements.text: The system shall provide a dedicated careers area from which users can access job openings and related applicant resources.
requirements.annotation_notes: The sequence starts on an MBTA Careers landing page and then moves into a dedicated Job Openings area, showing that the careers portal supports entry into the hiring workflow.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: the evidence could include every step

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to browse a catalog of open job postings in a dedicated job listings view.
The system shall support discoverability of job postings through keyword search over the listings catalog.
requirements.annotation_notes: A search field is persistently visible on the job openings page while the user browses filtered and unfiltered results.

requirements.text: The system shall allow applicants to filter job openings by department.
requirements.annotation_notes: The filter drawer exposes a Department facet and a department selection count becomes active after selection, showing department-based refinement.

requirements.text: The system shall allow applicants to filter job openings by estimated annual salary range or threshold.
requirements.annotation_notes: The filter flow includes an Estimated Annual Salary facet with selectable salary bands including a $100,000+ option.

requirements.text: The system shall support combining multiple filter criteria to narrow job results.
The system shall provide visible feedback about how many filters are active and which filter categories currently contain selections.
requirements.annotation_notes: Badges and counters are shown on the filter panel and on the main Filter control, making active refinement state visible to the user.

requirements.text: The system shall keep the displayed result set consistent with the selected filter criteria and the reported jobs found count.
requirements.annotation_notes: After the department and salary selections are active, the listings show three matching safety jobs with salaries above 100k, but full data correctness still depends on backend filtering logic.
requirements.manual_verification_notes: The UI implementation doesn't depend on requirement

requirements.text: The system shall expose posting recency and closing-status information in the job results so users can judge which openings are most recent or still open.
requirements.annotation_notes: List entries display posting age and closing indicators such as 'Posted 2 weeks ago' and 'Closes in 14 hours', which support latest-opening review.

requirements.text: The system shall present summary information for each job in list view, including title, compensation, department, and a brief description.
requirements.annotation_notes: Each listing card includes the job title, salary, department, and summary text before the user opens a detail view.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to navigate from a job listing to a detailed view for an individual opening.
requirements.annotation_notes: The flow moves from a filtered job list to a detailed panel for a selected opening, showing list-to-detail navigation.

requirements.text: The system shall preserve the applicant's current discovery context while moving between pages, filtering and job detail viewing.
requirements.annotation_notes: The filtered context leads into a selected job detail from the same narrowed result set, but persistence behavior across all navigation cases is only partially observable.

requirements.text: The system shall support sharing job postings through external channels such as social media and email.
requirements.annotation_notes: Social and email style action icons are visible beside job entries and in the detail panel, suggesting posting-sharing functionality, though the behavior is not executed here.

requirements.text: The system shall allow users to subscribe to job posting alerts for future openings.
requirements.annotation_notes: The careers landing page includes a dedicated Job Posting Alerts area, which strongly indicates an alert subscription capability even though the enrollment flow is not shown.
